_comment: Heuristic ranges from account usage Apr–Jun 2026. Not exact per-prompt pricing.

twin-ui.label: Twin UI (full)
twin-ui.notes: Orchestrator + 2 subagents + spec; full test gate if you confirm at end

cost-twin-ui.label: Cost Twin UI (abbreviated)
cost-twin-ui.notes: Narrow file scope; targeted tests only unless you ask for full suites

publish-on-web.label: Publish on web
publish-on-web.notes: User runs tests in terminal; agent commit/push/deploy only; excludes Railway/hosting fees
